text: Not receiving an email (SBCGlobal or Yahoo): Prefer Gmail. If using Yahoo Mail, add contact no-reply@smartbuilder360.com. Note SBCGlobal forwards to Yahoo.
Not receiving SignHere email: Try another email address. You will be notified for all future documents to be signed.
Can't open PDF files via Safari on iOS: Settings → Safari → Pop Up Blocker → Toggle Off.

Unresponsive pages: empty cache, restart browser/computer, try another browser/device, check internet speed. Create a new customer to test. If issue persists for one customer record, it might be corrupt, download info before deleting.
Contractor details missing: customer may have been created before contractor details were linked. Create a new customer and details should appear.

Jobs not being displayed: if admin jobs show but yours do not, check Admin settings. Ensure “Project Access” is not selected. If selected, only jobs created by that user appear (for sales associate teams).

Microsoft Teams cannot give control with 3 monitors if using Displaylink Manager with driver 1.12.1 (build 54) or less. Mac: turn off Displaylink Manager, use direct HDMI or HDMI→USB-C, remove external monitors. Windows: direct HDMI, remove external monitors.
PDFs and SignHere documents not displaying company info/logo: empty cache, quit browser, restart browser.
